purpose: Repo-local validation command registry for Codex and agent handoffs. Commands are declared here for review and optional execution; this file does not run anything by itself.
notes: Use the smallest validation set that matches the changed files.
Do not run deploy, push, merge, rebase, install, or destructive commands from this config without explicit approval.
Root TypeScript can be run through npm scripts, but if tsc hangs in this environment use the repo-approved local workaround before reporting failure.

docs_only.description: For Markdown and policy/config documentation changes only.

commands.name: git_status_short
commands.note: Confirms changed and untracked files before handoff.

commands.name: git_diff_name_only
commands.note: Confirms the tracked diff is limited to intended files.

commands.name: git_diff_check
commands.note: Checks for whitespace errors in tracked diffs.

commands.name: markdown_lint
commands.note: No repo-local Markdown lint script is currently defined.

config_only.description: For repo-local policy/config files that do not affect runtime code.

commands.name: git_status_short
commands.note: Confirms changed and untracked files before handoff.

commands.name: git_diff_name_only
commands.note: Confirms the tracked diff is limited to intended files.

commands.name: git_diff_check
commands.note: Checks for whitespace errors in tracked diffs.

commands.name: json_parse
commands.note: Validates this JSON config without installing packages.

app.description: For root TypeScript application, CLI, Hermes, runtime, and testable source changes.

commands.name: typecheck
commands.note: Uses the root package.json script.

commands.name: test
commands.note: Uses Vitest through the root package.json script.

commands.name: build
commands.note: Uses the root TypeScript build script.

dashboard.description: For dashboard work. Choose the matching dashboard surface based on changed files.

commands.name: next_dashboard_lint
commands.note: Only for changes under dashboard/. Requires dependencies already installed.

commands.name: next_dashboard_build
commands.note: Only for changes under dashboard/. Requires dependencies already installed.

commands.name: vite_dashboard_build
commands.note: Only for changes under ui/dashboard/. Requires dependencies already installed.

commands.name: vite_dashboard_lint
commands.note: No ui/dashboard lint script is currently defined.

full.description: For broad source changes after approval. Do not use for docs-only work by default.

commands.name: root_typecheck
commands.note: Root TypeScript validation.

commands.name: root_test
commands.note: Root Vitest suite.

commands.name: root_build
commands.note: Root TypeScript build.

commands.name: next_dashboard_build
commands.note: Run when dashboard/ may be affected.

commands.name: vite_dashboard_build
commands.note: Run when ui/dashboard/ may be affected.

forbidden_without_approval.description: Commands and action classes agents must not run unless explicit approval is granted.

commands.name: merge_rebase_push_deploy_release
commands.note: Includes git merge, git rebase, git push, deploy commands, release tags, and PR merge actions.

commands.name: destructive_git_or_filesystem
commands.note: Includes git reset --hard, git clean, recursive delete, force push, and mass move/rename.

commands.name: dependency_install_or_lockfile_change
commands.note: Includes npm install, npm update, package manager migration, and lockfile updates.

commands.name: secret_or_global_config_work
commands.note: Includes .env value handling, global Codex/Claude/MCP/skill settings, and hook activation.
